name: ground_truth_cp9_backup_frequency_ambiguous
description: Ground-truth fixture for CP-9 backup frequency where the documentation is INCONCLUSIVE: backups are running but the contingency plan does not state the required frequency / RTO / RPO, so alignment cannot be confirmed. The LLM SELF-SIGNALS abstain (abstain:true) — the legitimate 'I can't tell' path now that the low-confidence gate is removed (owner decision 2026-06-19). The narrative names what is missing (no stated frequency / RTO / RPO) so the investigator can request it and fall back to NC if it isn't provided. review_reason carries 'llm-abstain'.

ccis_row.guidance: 000534: The organization conducts backups of user-level information contained in the information system per organization-defined frequency consistent with recovery time and recovery point objectives.
ccis_row.procedures: The organization conducting the inspection/assessment obtains and examines the contingency plan, backup procedures, and backup logs to ensure the organization being inspected/assessed conducts backups of user-level information at the defined frequency.

tagged_evidence:
## Tagged evidence
- Contingency plan excerpt — references backup requirements but does not specify frequency or RTO/RPO targets.
- Backup job log (partial) — shows recent backup executions but schedule interval is unclear.

llm_stub_proposals.narrative: Examined the contingency plan and backup job logs; user-level backups are being conducted, but the contingency plan states no required backup frequency or RTO/RPO targets, so alignment with the organization-defined frequency cannot be confirmed from the artifacts alone. The required frequency / RTO / RPO must be provided before a verdict can be reached.
